title: Wild's GUI
description: A dark gui with green accents. Featuring a colour pallette and style similar to the default launcher. And green and red buttons depending on the context.
body:
Used by me, Wild, personally for a dark unique aesthetic with green boarders and buttons. And in some cases red buttons depending on the context. Designed to be more morden and symetrical keeping to the minecraft feel.

See the gallery for some previews

### Mod Support
currently none

### CIT/Optifine additions
currently none

### Planned Mod Support
I may also do requests too
- JEI, REI
- Simple Voice Chat
- Mod menu, cloth config
- Inventory Profiles, Sophisticated, Bundle Inventory
- Curios API, Trinkets



### Planned CIT/Optifine additons
- Shulker Boxes
- Chest Types

# NEWS: Major Update coming
Slight Colour changes happening for the theme and better consistency \
Loads of mods to be supported: currently finished textures for Inventory Profiles Next, Curios API, Inventory Manegment, Better Advancements \
Optine and etc: still debating whether it should be this upcoming update or another. I may leave it for the next so there's time for reports on the state of the mod textures. And to give time for extra ideas/requests.
Stay tuned for the release

# Contact and other info
Any problems, suggestions, questions or requests head over to my discord. \
[Discord over here](https://discord.gg/NAd2jxWCDz) \
You will be a temporary member unless you give the thumbs up.
